home.heroSubtitle: Track price drops, compare price history, and go directly to trusted retailers.
home.heroDisclosure: We don't sell products directly — we help you find verified deals and redirect you to trusted retailers.
home.noDeals: No deals available for your location yet. Check back soon.

deal.affiliateBadgeTooltip: We may earn a commission on purchases via this link, at no extra cost to you.
deal.ninetyDayLow: Lowest price in 90 days on DealRadar.

alert.success: Done! We'll email you when the price drops.
alert.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
alert.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

search.noResults: No deals match your filters. Try widening the price range or lowering the minimum discount.

geo.promptBody: Allow location access to see deals from shops in your city. If you decline, we estimate your country from your IP address.

gdpr.bannerBody: We use essential cookies for language and location. Optional cookies help us improve the site with anonymous usage statistics.

consent.title: We value your privacy
consent.description: We use essential cookies to make DealRadar work (language and location). With your consent we also use analytics cookies to understand usage and improve the site. You can accept or reject non-essential cookies, and change your choice anytime via “Cookie settings”.
consent.prefDescription: Essential cookies are always active. Choose whether to allow analytics cookies.
consent.necessaryDescription: Required for core functionality such as language and location. Always on.
consent.analyticsDescription: Help us measure usage anonymously so we can improve the site. Off until you allow them.

footer.affiliateDisclosure: DealRadar may earn a commission when you buy through links on this site — at no extra cost to you.

imprint.title: Imprint (Impressum)
imprint.infoLine: Information according to § 5 TMG / European E-Commerce Directive:
imprint.disputeBody: The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (ODR): <link>https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr</link>. We are neither obliged nor willing to participate in dispute-resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: DealRadar respects your privacy and processes personal data in accordance with the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR, EU 2016/679). This policy explains what data we process, why, and the rights you have.
privacy.s1Body: The controller responsible for data processing on this website is the operator named in our Imprint. Contact us at the email address listed there for any data-protection request.
privacy.s2Body: Price-alert subscriptions: your email address and the target product, used solely to send price-drop notifications. Approximate location: your country is estimated from network headers (and, only with your consent, your browser location) to show local deals; precise coordinates are processed transiently and never stored. Cookie preferences: your consent choice is stored to honour it on future visits.
privacy.s3Body: We use the following processors under data-processing agreements: Supabase (database hosting), Upstash (Redis caching and rate limiting), Resend (transactional email), and our affiliate networks (Awin, Kelkoo, Tradedoubler, Strackr) which receive an anonymised tracking identifier when you click an outbound deal link. Our edge host processes server log data (including IP) to operate the service securely (Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR).
privacy.s4Body: We set strictly necessary cookies for language and location, which require no consent. Analytics cookies are optional and set only after you opt in via the cookie banner. You can withdraw consent at any time through “Cookie settings” in the footer.
privacy.s5Body: You have the right to access, rectify, erase (Art. 17), restrict and port your personal data, and to object to or withdraw consent at any time without affecting prior lawful processing. To exercise these rights, contact the address in our Imprint. You may also lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority.
privacy.s6Body: Every price-alert email contains a one-click unsubscribe link secured by an HMAC token. Following it deletes your subscription immediately and without further verification, satisfying the right to withdraw consent and to erasure. Subscriptions are also deleted automatically after a defined retention period.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1Body: DealRadar is a price-comparison and affiliate referral index. We do not sell products and are not a party to any purchase. We aggregate offers from third-party merchants and affiliate networks and link you to the retailer.
terms.s2Body: Any purchase contract is concluded solely between you and the respective merchant, under that merchant's terms and conditions. Questions about orders, payment, delivery, returns and warranties must be directed to the merchant.
terms.s3Body: Prices and availability change dynamically and are provided by third parties. The price and availability shown on the merchant's site at checkout are authoritative. DealRadar is not liable for discrepancies between listed and actual prices.
terms.s4Body: Outbound links on DealRadar are affiliate links. We may earn a referral commission on qualifying purchases at no additional cost to you. Affiliate links are marked as such next to the outbound button.

unsubscribe.successBody: You will no longer receive price-drop alerts for this deal.
unsubscribe.errorBody: We could not verify the security token. The link may be incomplete or expired.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.body: We couldn't load this page. Please try again.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has moved.
